TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == mapatayay di'tu ś≠ĽÁ•ěBLEACH == angangan patucekan Śüļśú¨Ť®≠Śģö itini i "BLEACH" a kitakidan, micapitu yadahay nu canancanan nu tatiedan, idaw ku " aydaay" atu " nu mapatayay" nu tusaay a maudipay mapatayay nu nikakeniahan a kitakidan. aydaay a nikapatay a malaadingu, panganga han "milimuu't". anu " milimuut" anu maala nu nglay hamaw sa makan, sadikuday malaadada nu maudipay u " masiyan", adinguay a " mapatayay nu di'tu" tahekal satu, u " sapipatay tu adingu a takini" lisapenen ku "siyan" patayda i " mapatayay a adinguan", yu maudipan henay nu micidekay ku katal patayda han namin i " i duu'tay". iteban nu mapatayay a adinguan, idaw ku cacayay nu sapiputaw a kitidaan u sapipuhpuh tu adinguan, u siidaay atu mapatayay nu di'tuan a kitidaan kuyda. Śú®"BLEACH" . hucu nu adingu itida namin milakalak i patiyamay, siicelangay a adinguan taneng papinanamen mala mapatayay a di'tu. " hu-tin sabaw tulu a kaputan" u mapatayay a di'tu ku palekalay, u situngusay u masakaputay nu Cin-lin-ten, nina masakaputay mipili' tu sakapahay a tademaw mala sakakaay. ina misulitay a tademaw manamuh tu nu mipaypayay a kawawan, pasu Tun-sen kangalayan nida a sakasiwa nu kulitan Śćć. " mapatayay a di'tu" micukaymas ku mipaypayay tu sakasiwa a kulitan nu sapatucek, satu nu nisulitay miala tu namakacuwacuwaay nu kanatalan a sinzaan a cudacudadan, ina ni panganganan pulungen tu namakacuwacuwaay a kanatalan nu nganganan, "se-zen" atu " puo-men" patucek han namaka Yi-se-lan-ciw, "bunac sep sulit mikacaway masakaputay" nipatucekan namakayda i De-kuo a kanatalan, pulungen tu " kilisetu" atu " yu-tay-kiwkay" a cudadan. , . kakungkuan śēÖšļčŚ§ßÁ∂Ī nikakenisan tu kakungkuan ŚäáśÉÖÁĮáÁę†ŚäÉŚąÜ ci He-ci-yi-hu makamelaw tu nikapatayan nu micudaday tu nu siningan, idaw ku cacayay a demiadan ci mapatayay nu kilangan ci Lu-ci-ya miladay tu duu'tay a adipapang tahekal tayda i kakabian nida, sayaway pabaliw ci nida, nika kilulsa idaw ku cacayay nu masiyanay a tademaw mi'dis tu ci Yi-hu a luma'an. ci Lu-ci-ya atu masiyanay tu nikalepacawan a maduka, hang satu pabeli ku mapatayay a di'tu tu icelang ci Yi-huan, pabelien ku mapatayay nu di'tuan sapilawpes ci masiyanay, mapaaw ci nida tu icelang ni Yi-hu. ci Yi-hu hamin han ni Lu-ci-ya a mihuchuc ku icelang, itini satu, ci Yi-hu miala tu mapatayay a di'tu tu kawaw, lawpesen nida ci siyan itida i Kun-cuo-tin nu kitidaan. . ci Yi-hu matulin a milawpes tu ci siyanan, katukuh tu cacay a demiadan ci Lu-ci-ya pabelien nida ku icelang i mapatayay di'tuan maadih nu mapatayay nu adinguan, u hu-tin sabaw tulu a kaputan enem masakaputay nu tusa a sakakaay ci Siw-mu-pay-cay aci A-san-cin-len-ce pacici' han nida patayda taluma' i mapatayay nu adinguan. ci Lu-ci-ya patay han tu, tu mangalay a miala ci Lu-ci-yaan, ci Yi-hu miala tu nipicidekan tu nipikunlingan ci Pu-ye-si-cu' tu cen-hun-daw " milangatu mipeca'", mapulung atu kaput ci Cin-san-ce-ci aci Ca-tu-tay-hu, Mei-ci-se-se-ten-yi-lung, pu-yen a matenesay nu cabayan ci Se-fun-yen-ye-y maladay ku nu heni aci Pu-yen nu gigicuan talaayaw tayda i mapatayay nu adinguan. " midayliay tu mapatayay nu di'tuan. mahedek tu". debungan nu heni ku Cin-li-tin caay ka tenes, kanamuhan nu heni a sakalima nu sakakaay ci Lan-zan-u-yu-cei patayen nu taw, malawlaw namin kina Cin-li-tin. ya katuuday midebung namini i " liw-huo", lawaen nu mapatayay di'tu. ci Yi-hu itida i papululan nu Lu-ci-ya a mapulul " cen-cuy-kung" tu nuayawan malalikeluh aci Siw-mu-pay-cay, mangalay mi'dis ci Pay-cayan, salabi sa ci Yi-hu aci Yi-cin micudad tu cin-hun-daw Śćć, misabaluhay tu icelang a miput tu sapipatay. sicumiay nu namipacukay ci Lan-zan nu cacay a bataan nu masakaputay ci Ze-hun-tun-se-lang saan tut ulu a masakaputay a sakakaay ci Se'-wan-in u mipacukay a tademaw sa, sadikuday katinengan nu taw alaw u miuculay tu katuuday kina mapatayay ci Lan-zan . ina ci Lan-zan itini i papatayay patahekalen nida ku icelang, maala nida ku ilabuay nu udipan ni Lu-ci-ay a "pung-yi", maladay satu tatusay tadikud i " siyan kitidaan". mahedek tu. nadikudan nu nikalepacawan hamaw satu a masanga, ci Yi-hu taluma tu nu aydaay a nikaudip malingatu tu midayli tu mapatayay di'tu a kawaw. duma satu, wama ni Yi-hu matapal nida ku wayway ni Lan-zan, tu nikalingatu a malamapatayay di'tu a nika tahekal. ci Yi-hu namaka siyan mabilil a tayni, caay pakademec ci Lan-zanan. ci Lan-zan aci pung-yi mapulung mikikaka tu mapatayay di'tu aci siyan nu icelang, adidi' tu ku ngalay ci Yi-huan. ci Yi-sin putunen nida tu demiad miedap ci Yi-huan a micudad, mahedek tu micudad ci Yi-hu u patay di'tu a icelang ku sapipalekal " sadikuday nu ye-ya-ten-cun", malaheci midemec ci Lan-zan, dakepen ci Lan-zan pulul han tu. . mapalekal satu ku mapatayay di'tu a icelang, ci Yi-hu midayli tu sakataluma i mapatayay di'tuan, matulin a itida i kun-cuo-tin a mikuli. itida i " caayay pakaadih tu kanatalan" a men-cei-se masakaputay midebung tu siyan a niyaduan, ala han nida ci Puo-min malahitay nida, debungan ku cin-lin-ten yadah ku nipipatay tu mapatayay di'tuan, tayda satu i sakakaay ci San-pen-yen-liw-cay a kanatalan saan a musakamu. ina "caayay pakaadih tu kanatalan" ina sakakaay ci Yu-ha-pa-ha u tapang nu Mie-cie a mipatayay, mipatayay tu Lin-wan, patideng tu nayi ku patay han nanay, nayi ku talaw ni kitakid a mukti. . caayay kamelaw nu Ti-kuo a nipalekal tu nipidi'san, utiih a mipu't ku mapatayay a di'tu, ci Yu-ha-pa-ha midebung tu Lin-wan-kun, micaliw tu lima ni Yi-hu a mipatay tu Lin-wan.ci Yu-ha-pa-ha alawen nida ku icelang ni Lin-wan, mala sasumaden tu tatayda nu sasakakatinengan. ci Yu-ha-pa-ha itini i kapatayan nu aadinguan patideng tu biyu, ci Yi-hu katuud ku nu heni a midebung tiya biyuan, ci Se-ten-yi-lun miales a midebung pasayda i tawan a miedap, nika ci Yi-hu malepacaw henay alawen ni Yu-ha-pa-ha ku icelang. sadikuday itini ci Ye-daw a misumad tu na ayaway, ci Lan-zan micukaymas tu sakay dadinguan tu nanum, ci Se-ten patesulan tu idang nu gim a pana' nu nipiedapan a milepacaw, ci Yi-hu malingatu aca asiicelang, malawpes ci Yu-ha-pa-ha, kaisa tu wayway ni Yu-ha-pa-ha. nikalepacawan tu cacay a bataan, ci Yi-hu aci Ce-ci maleacawa, idaw ku cacyay nida a tatamaan a wawa ci Yi-yun, ci Lu-ci-ya tapabaw malasakakaay, atu ci Len-ce idaw ku wawa nuheni tu tataynaan ci Mei-hu, duma a cabayan atu mapatayay a di'tuan idaw namin ku kawaw nu heni. ci Yi-yun idaw ku caayay katinengi a icelang, u cinida a cacay malawpes nida ku icelang ni Yu-ha-pa-ha nu. "nu pinaay a malebutan nu nikalepacawan a cudad. mahedek tu". . milauyd tu tusa a mihcaan, cacayay a luma'an milabu tu sabaw tulu a kaputan nu sakakaay ci Hu-ce sabaw sepat a nipitademan, maadih nida ku aydaay atu dikuku tu sakalecad a mamalawpes nu ayda, ci Yi-un patahekalen nida ku sakatayda i dikuku a icelang, maadih nida ku dikuku nu adipapang, ina ka kunkuan caay henay ka hedek. ŚŹąťĀéšļÜ2ŚĻī, .
S.PHON: == mapatajaj di Ē~ °tu **br~…ĺ…ôa ¶ńß == aŇčaŇčan patu ¶…ôkan **** itini i "br~…ĺ…ôa ¶ńß" a kitakidan, mi ¶apitu jadańßaj nu ¶anan ¶anan nu tati…ôdan, idaw ku " ajdaaj" atu " nu mapatajaj" nu tusaaj a maudipaj mapatajaj nu nikak…ôniańßan a kitakidan. ajdaaj a nikapataj a mar~…ĺaadiŇču, paŇčaŇča ńßan "mir~…ĺimuu Ē~ °t". anu " mir~…ĺimuut" anu maar~…ĺa nu Ňčr~…ĺaj ńßamaw sa makan, sadikudaj mar~…ĺaadada nu maudipaj u " masijan", adiŇčuaj a " mapatajaj nu di Ē~ °tu" tańß…ôkar~…ĺ satu, u " sapipataj tu adiŇču a takini" r~…ĺisap…ôn…ôn ku "sijan" patajda i " mapatajaj a adiŇčuan", ju maudipan ńß…ônaj nu mi ¶id…ôkaj ku katar~…ĺ patajda ńßan namin i " i duu Ē~ °taj". it…ôban nu mapatajaj a adiŇčuan, idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj nu sapiputaw a kitidaan u sapipuńßpuńß tu adiŇčuan, u siidaaj atu mapatajaj nu di Ē~ °tuan a kitidaan kujda. *"br~…ĺ…ôa ¶ńß" . ńßu ¶u nu adiŇču itida namin mir~…ĺakar~…ĺak i patijamaj, sii ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a adiŇčuan tan…ôŇč papinanam…ôn mar~…ĺa mapatajaj a di Ē~ °tu. " ńßu-tin sabaw tur~…ĺu a kaputan" u mapatajaj a di Ē~ °tu ku par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺaj, u situŇčusaj u masakaputaj nu ¶in-r~…ĺin-t…ôn, nina masakaputaj mipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu sakapańßaj a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺa sakakaaj. ina misur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw manamuńß tu nu mipajpajaj a kawawan, pasu tun-s…ôn kaŇčar~…ĺajan nida a sakasiwa nu kur~…ĺitan *. " mapatajaj a di Ē~ °tu" mi ¶ukajmas ku mipajpajaj tu sakasiwa a kur~…ĺitan nu sapatu ¶…ôk, satu nu nisur~…ĺitaj miar~…ĺa tu namaka ¶uwa ¶uwaaj nu kanatar~…ĺan a sinzaan a ¶uda ¶udadan, ina ni paŇčaŇčanan pur~…ĺuŇč…ôn tu namaka ¶uwa ¶uwaaj a kanatar~…ĺan nu ŇčaŇčanan, "s…ô-z…ôn" atu " puo-m…ôn" patu ¶…ôk ńßan namaka ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan- ¶iw, "buna ¶ s…ôp sur~…ĺit mika ¶awaj masakaputaj" nipatu ¶…ôkan namakajda i d…ô-kuo a kanatar~…ĺan, pur~…ĺuŇč…ôn tu " kir~…ĺis…ôtu" atu " ju-taj-kiwkaj" a ¶udadan. , . kakuŇčkuan **** nikak…ônisan tu kakuŇčkuan ****** ¶i ńß…ô- ¶i-ji-ńßu makam…ôr~…ĺaw tu nikapatajan nu mi ¶udadaj tu nu siniŇčan, idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj a d…ômiadan ¶i mapatajaj nu kir~…ĺaŇčan ¶i r~…ĺu- ¶i-ja mir~…ĺadaj tu duu Ē~ °taj a adipapaŇč tańß…ôkar~…ĺ tajda i kakabian nida, sajawaj pabar~…ĺiw ¶i nida, nika kir~…ĺur~…ĺsa idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj nu masijanaj a tad…ômaw mi Ē~ °dis tu ¶i ji-ńßu a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an. ¶i r~…ĺu- ¶i-ja atu masijanaj tu nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan a maduka, ńßaŇč satu pab…ôr~…ĺi ku mapatajaj a di Ē~ °tu tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ¶i ji-ńßuan, pab…ôr~…ĺi…ôn ku mapatajaj nu di Ē~ °tuan sapir~…ĺawp…ôs ¶i masijanaj, mapaaw ¶i nida tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ni ji-ńßu. ¶i ji-ńßu ńßamin ńßan ni r~…ĺu- ¶i-ja a mińßu ¶ńßu ¶ ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, itini satu, ¶i ji-ńßu miar~…ĺa tu mapatajaj a di Ē~ °tu tu kawaw, r~…ĺawp…ôs…ôn nida ¶i sijan itida i kun- ¶uo-tin nu kitidaan. . ¶i ji-ńßu matur~…ĺin a mir~…ĺawp…ôs tu ¶i sijanan, katukuńß tu ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiadan ¶i r~…ĺu- ¶i-ja pab…ôr~…ĺi…ôn nida ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč i mapatajaj di Ē~ °tuan maadińß nu mapatajaj nu adiŇčuan, u ńßu-tin sabaw tur~…ĺu a kaputan …ôn…ôm masakaputaj nu tusa a sakakaaj ¶i siw-mu-paj- ¶aj a ¶i a-san- ¶in-r~…ĺ…ôn- ¶…ô pa ¶i ¶i Ē~ ° ńßan nida patajda tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i mapatajaj nu adiŇčuan. ¶i r~…ĺu- ¶i-ja pataj ńßan tu, tu maŇčar~…ĺaj a miar~…ĺa ¶i r~…ĺu- ¶i-jaan, ¶i ji-ńßu miar~…ĺa tu nipi ¶id…ôkan tu nipikunr~…ĺiŇčan ¶i pu-j…ô-si- ¶u Ē~ ° tu ¶…ôn-ńßun-daw " mir~…ĺaŇčatu mip…ô ¶a Ē~ °", mapur~…ĺuŇč atu kaput ¶i ¶in-san- ¶…ô- ¶i a ¶i ¶a-tu-taj-ńßu, m…ôi- ¶i-s…ô-s…ô-t…ôn-ji-r~…ĺuŇč, pu-j…ôn a mat…ôn…ôsaj nu ¶abajan ¶i s…ô-fun-j…ôn-j…ô-j mar~…ĺadaj ku nu ńß…ôni a ¶i pu-j…ôn nu gigi ¶uan tar~…ĺaajaw tajda i mapatajaj nu adiŇčuan. " midajr~…ĺiaj tu mapatajaj nu di Ē~ °tuan. mańß…ôd…ôk tu". d…ôbuŇčan nu ńß…ôni ku ¶in-r~…ĺi-tin ¶aaj ka t…ôn…ôs, kanamuńßan nu ńß…ôni a sakar~…ĺima nu sakakaaj ¶i r~…ĺan-zan-u-ju- ¶…ôi pataj…ôn nu taw, mar~…ĺawr~…ĺaw namin kina ¶in-r~…ĺi-tin. ja katuudaj mid…ôbuŇč namini i " r~…ĺiw-ńßuo", r~…ĺawa…ôn nu mapatajaj di Ē~ °tu. ¶i ji-ńßu itida i papur~…ĺur~…ĺan nu r~…ĺu- ¶i-ja a mapur~…ĺur~…ĺ " ¶…ôn- ¶uj-kuŇč" tu nuajawan mar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß a ¶i siw-mu-paj- ¶aj, maŇčar~…ĺaj mi Ē~ °dis ¶i paj- ¶ajan, sar~…ĺabi sa ¶i ji-ńßu a ¶i ji- ¶in mi ¶udad tu ¶in-ńßun-daw *, misabar~…ĺuńßaj tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč a miput tu sapipataj. si ¶umiaj nu namipa ¶ukaj ¶i r~…ĺan-zan nu ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu masakaputaj ¶i z…ô-ńßun-tun-s…ô-r~…ĺaŇč saan tut ur~…ĺu a masakaputaj a sakakaaj ¶i s…ô Ē~ °-wan-in u mipa ¶ukaj a tad…ômaw sa, sadikudaj katin…ôŇčan nu taw ar~…ĺaw u miu ¶ur~…ĺaj tu katuudaj kina mapatajaj ¶i r~…ĺan-zan . ina ¶i r~…ĺan-zan itini i papatajaj patańß…ôkar~…ĺ…ôn nida ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, maar~…ĺa nida ku ir~…ĺabuaj nu udipan ni r~…ĺu- ¶i-aj a "puŇč-ji", mar~…ĺadaj satu tatusaj tadikud i " sijan kitidaan". mańß…ôd…ôk tu. nadikudan nu nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan ńßamaw satu a masaŇča, ¶i ji-ńßu tar~…ĺuma tu nu ajdaaj a nikaudip mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu midajr~…ĺi tu mapatajaj di Ē~ °tu a kawaw. duma satu, wama ni ji-ńßu matapar~…ĺ nida ku wajwaj ni r~…ĺan-zan, tu nikar~…ĺiŇčatu a mar~…ĺamapatajaj di Ē~ °tu a nika tańß…ôkar~…ĺ. ¶i ji-ńßu namaka sijan mabir~…ĺir~…ĺ a tajni, ¶aaj pakad…ôm…ô ¶ ¶i r~…ĺan-zanan. ¶i r~…ĺan-zan a ¶i puŇč-ji mapur~…ĺuŇč mikikaka tu mapatajaj di Ē~ °tu a ¶i sijan nu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, adidi Ē~ ° tu ku Ňčar~…ĺaj ¶i ji-ńßuan. ¶i ji-sin putun…ôn nida tu d…ômiad mi…ôdap ¶i ji-ńßuan a mi ¶udad, mańß…ôd…ôk tu mi ¶udad ¶i ji-ńßu u pataj di Ē~ °tu a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku sapipar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ " sadikudaj nu j…ô-ja-t…ôn- ¶un", mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i mid…ôm…ô ¶ ¶i r~…ĺan-zan, dak…ôp…ôn ¶i r~…ĺan-zan pur~…ĺur~…ĺ ńßan tu. . mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ satu ku mapatajaj di Ē~ °tu a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, ¶i ji-ńßu midajr~…ĺi tu sakatar~…ĺuma i mapatajaj di Ē~ °tuan, matur~…ĺin a itida i kun- ¶uo-tin a mikur~…ĺi. itida i " ¶aajaj pakaadińß tu kanatar~…ĺan" a m…ôn- ¶…ôi-s…ô masakaputaj mid…ôbuŇč tu sijan a nijaduan, ar~…ĺa ńßan nida ¶i puo-min mar~…ĺańßitaj nida, d…ôbuŇčan ku ¶in-r~…ĺin-t…ôn jadańß ku nipipataj tu mapatajaj di Ē~ °tuan, tajda satu i sakakaaj ¶i san-p…ôn-j…ôn-r~…ĺiw- ¶aj a kanatar~…ĺan saan a musakamu. ina " ¶aajaj pakaadińß tu kanatar~…ĺan" ina sakakaaj ¶i ju-ńßa-pa-ńßa u tapaŇč nu mi…ô- ¶i…ô a mipatajaj, mipatajaj tu r~…ĺin-wan, patid…ôŇč tu naji ku pataj ńßan nanaj, naji ku tar~…ĺaw ni kitakid a mukti. . ¶aajaj kam…ôr~…ĺaw nu ti-kuo a nipar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu nipidi Ē~ °san, utiińß a mipu Ē~ °t ku mapatajaj a di Ē~ °tu, ¶i ju-ńßa-pa-ńßa mid…ôbuŇč tu r~…ĺin-wan-kun, mi ¶ar~…ĺiw tu r~…ĺima ni ji-ńßu a mipataj tu r~…ĺin-wan. ¶i ju-ńßa-pa-ńßa ar~…ĺaw…ôn nida ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ni r~…ĺin-wan, mar~…ĺa sasumad…ôn tu tatajda nu sasakakatin…ôŇčan. ¶i ju-ńßa-pa-ńßa itini i kapatajan nu aadiŇčuan patid…ôŇč tu biju, ¶i ji-ńßu katuud ku nu ńß…ôni a mid…ôbuŇč tija bijuan, ¶i s…ô-t…ôn-ji-r~…ĺun miar~…ĺ…ôs a mid…ôbuŇč pasajda i tawan a mi…ôdap, nika ¶i ji-ńßu mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw ńß…ônaj ar~…ĺaw…ôn ni ju-ńßa-pa-ńßa ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč. sadikudaj itini ¶i j…ô-daw a misumad tu na ajawaj, ¶i r~…ĺan-zan mi ¶ukajmas tu sakaj dadiŇčuan tu nanum, ¶i s…ô-t…ôn pat…ôsur~…ĺan tu idaŇč nu gim a pana Ē~ ° nu nipi…ôdapan a mir~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw, ¶i ji-ńßu mar~…ĺiŇčatu a ¶a asii ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, mar~…ĺawp…ôs ¶i ju-ńßa-pa-ńßa, kaisa tu wajwaj ni ju-ńßa-pa-ńßa. nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan, ¶i ji-ńßu a ¶i ¶…ô- ¶i mar~…ĺ…ôa ¶awa, idaw ku ¶a ¶jaj nida a tatamaan a wawa ¶i ji-jun, ¶i r~…ĺu- ¶i-ja tapabaw mar~…ĺasakakaaj, atu ¶i r~…ĺ…ôn- ¶…ô idaw ku wawa nuńß…ôni tu tatajnaan ¶i m…ôi-ńßu, duma a ¶abajan atu mapatajaj a di Ē~ °tuan idaw namin ku kawaw nu ńß…ôni. ¶i ji-jun idaw ku ¶aajaj katin…ôŇči a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, u ¶inida a ¶a ¶aj mar~…ĺawp…ôs nida ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ni ju-ńßa-pa-ńßa nu. "nu pinaaj a mar~…ĺ…ôbutan nu nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan a ¶udad. mańß…ôd…ôk tu". . mir~…ĺaujd tu tusa a mińß ¶aan, ¶a ¶ajaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an mir~…ĺabu tu sabaw tur~…ĺu a kaputan nu sakakaaj ¶i ńßu- ¶…ô sabaw s…ôpat a nipitad…ôman, maadińß nida ku ajdaaj atu dikuku tu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a mamar~…ĺawp…ôs nu ajda, ¶i ji-un patańß…ôkar~…ĺ…ôn nida ku sakatajda i dikuku a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, maadińß nida ku dikuku nu adipapaŇč, ina ka kunkuan ¶aaj ńß…ônaj ka ńß…ôd…ôk. *****, .
S.FORM: == mapatayay di'tu ś≠ĽÁ•ěBLEACH == angangan patucekan Śüļśú¨Ť®≠Śģö itini i "BLEACH" a kitakidan, micapitu yadahay nu canancanan nu tatiedan, idaw ku " aydaay" atu " nu mapatayay" nu tusaay a maudipay mapatayay nu nikakeniahan a kitakidan. aydaay a nikapatay a malaadingu, panganga han "milimuu't". anu " milimuut" anu maala nu nglay hamaw sa makan, sadikuday malaadada nu maudipay u " masiyan", adinguay a " mapatayay nu di'tu" tahekal satu, u " sapipatay tu adingu a takini" lisapenen ku "siyan" patayda i " mapatayay a adinguan", yu maudipan henay nu micidekay ku katal patayda han namin i " i duu'tay". iteban nu mapatayay a adinguan, idaw ku cacayay nu sapiputaw a kitidaan u sapipuhpuh tu adinguan, u siidaay atu mapatayay nu di'tuan a kitidaan kuyda. Śú®"BLEACH" . hucu nu adingu itida namin milakalak i patiyamay, siicelangay a adinguan taneng papinanamen mala mapatayay a di'tu. " hu-tin sabaw tulu a kaputan" u mapatayay a di'tu ku palekalay, u situngusay u masakaputay nu Cin-lin-ten, nina masakaputay mipili' tu sakapahay a tademaw mala sakakaay. ina misulitay a tademaw manamuh tu nu mipaypayay a kawawan, pasu Tun-sen kangalayan nida a sakasiwa nu kulitan Śćć. " mapatayay a di'tu" micukaymas ku mipaypayay tu sakasiwa a kulitan nu sapatucek, satu nu nisulitay miala tu namakacuwacuwaay nu kanatalan a sinzaan a cudacudadan, ina ni panganganan pulungen tu namakacuwacuwaay a kanatalan nu nganganan, "se-zen" atu " puo-men" patucek han namaka Yi-se-lan-ciw, "bunac sep sulit mikacaway masakaputay" nipatucekan namakayda i De-kuo a kanatalan, pulungen tu " kilisetu" atu " yu-tay-kiwkay" a cudadan. , . kakungkuan śēÖšļčŚ§ßÁ∂Ī nikakenisan tu kakungkuan ŚäáśÉÖÁĮáÁę†ŚäÉŚąÜ ci He-ci-yi-hu makamelaw tu nikapatayan nu micudaday tu nu siningan, idaw ku cacayay a demiadan ci mapatayay nu kilangan ci Lu-ci-ya miladay tu duu'tay a adipapang tahekal tayda i kakabian nida, sayaway pabaliw ci nida, nika kilulsa idaw ku cacayay nu masiyanay a tademaw mi'dis tu ci Yi-hu a luma'an. ci Lu-ci-ya atu masiyanay tu nikalepacawan a maduka, hang satu pabeli ku mapatayay a di'tu tu icelang ci Yi-huan, pabelien ku mapatayay nu di'tuan sapilawpes ci masiyanay, mapaaw ci nida tu icelang ni Yi-hu. ci Yi-hu hamin han ni Lu-ci-ya a mihuchuc ku icelang, itini satu, ci Yi-hu miala tu mapatayay a di'tu tu kawaw, lawpesen nida ci siyan itida i Kun-cuo-tin nu kitidaan. . ci Yi-hu matulin a milawpes tu ci siyanan, katukuh tu cacay a demiadan ci Lu-ci-ya pabelien nida ku icelang i mapatayay di'tuan maadih nu mapatayay nu adinguan, u hu-tin sabaw tulu a kaputan enem masakaputay nu tusa a sakakaay ci Siw-mu-pay-cay aci A-san-cin-len-ce pacici' han nida patayda taluma' i mapatayay nu adinguan. ci Lu-ci-ya patay han tu, tu mangalay a miala ci Lu-ci-yaan, ci Yi-hu miala tu nipicidekan tu nipikunlingan ci Pu-ye-si-cu' tu cen-hun-daw " milangatu mipeca'", mapulung atu kaput ci Cin-san-ce-ci aci Ca-tu-tay-hu, Mei-ci-se-se-ten-yi-lung, pu-yen a matenesay nu cabayan ci Se-fun-yen-ye-y maladay ku nu heni aci Pu-yen nu gigicuan talaayaw tayda i mapatayay nu adinguan. " midayliay tu mapatayay nu di'tuan. mahedek tu". debungan nu heni ku Cin-li-tin caay ka tenes, kanamuhan nu heni a sakalima nu sakakaay ci Lan-zan-u-yu-cei patayen nu taw, malawlaw namin kina Cin-li-tin. ya katuuday midebung namini i " liw-huo", lawaen nu mapatayay di'tu. ci Yi-hu itida i papululan nu Lu-ci-ya a mapulul " cen-cuy-kung" tu nuayawan malalikeluh aci Siw-mu-pay-cay, mangalay mi'dis ci Pay-cayan, salabi sa ci Yi-hu aci Yi-cin micudad tu cin-hun-daw Śćć, misabaluhay tu icelang a miput tu sapipatay. sicumiay nu namipacukay ci Lan-zan nu cacay a bataan nu masakaputay ci Ze-hun-tun-se-lang saan tut ulu a masakaputay a sakakaay ci Se'-wan-in u mipacukay a tademaw sa, sadikuday katinengan nu taw alaw u miuculay tu katuuday kina mapatayay ci Lan-zan . ina ci Lan-zan itini i papatayay patahekalen nida ku icelang, maala nida ku ilabuay nu udipan ni Lu-ci-ay a "pung-yi", maladay satu tatusay tadikud i " siyan kitidaan". mahedek tu. nadikudan nu nikalepacawan hamaw satu a masanga, ci Yi-hu taluma tu nu aydaay a nikaudip malingatu tu midayli tu mapatayay di'tu a kawaw. duma satu, wama ni Yi-hu matapal nida ku wayway ni Lan-zan, tu nikalingatu a malamapatayay di'tu a nika tahekal. ci Yi-hu namaka siyan mabilil a tayni, caay pakademec ci Lan-zanan. ci Lan-zan aci pung-yi mapulung mikikaka tu mapatayay di'tu aci siyan nu icelang, adidi' tu ku ngalay ci Yi-huan. ci Yi-sin putunen nida tu demiad miedap ci Yi-huan a micudad, mahedek tu micudad ci Yi-hu u patay di'tu a icelang ku sapipalekal " sadikuday nu ye-ya-ten-cun", malaheci midemec ci Lan-zan, dakepen ci Lan-zan pulul han tu. . mapalekal satu ku mapatayay di'tu a icelang, ci Yi-hu midayli tu sakataluma i mapatayay di'tuan, matulin a itida i kun-cuo-tin a mikuli. itida i " caayay pakaadih tu kanatalan" a men-cei-se masakaputay midebung tu siyan a niyaduan, ala han nida ci Puo-min malahitay nida, debungan ku cin-lin-ten yadah ku nipipatay tu mapatayay di'tuan, tayda satu i sakakaay ci San-pen-yen-liw-cay a kanatalan saan a musakamu. ina "caayay pakaadih tu kanatalan" ina sakakaay ci Yu-ha-pa-ha u tapang nu Mie-cie a mipatayay, mipatayay tu Lin-wan, patideng tu nayi ku patay han nanay, nayi ku talaw ni kitakid a mukti. . caayay kamelaw nu Ti-kuo a nipalekal tu nipidi'san, utiih a mipu't ku mapatayay a di'tu, ci Yu-ha-pa-ha midebung tu Lin-wan-kun, micaliw tu lima ni Yi-hu a mipatay tu Lin-wan.ci Yu-ha-pa-ha alawen nida ku icelang ni Lin-wan, mala sasumaden tu tatayda nu sasakakatinengan. ci Yu-ha-pa-ha itini i kapatayan nu aadinguan patideng tu biyu, ci Yi-hu katuud ku nu heni a midebung tiya biyuan, ci Se-ten-yi-lun miales a midebung pasayda i tawan a miedap, nika ci Yi-hu malepacaw henay alawen ni Yu-ha-pa-ha ku icelang. sadikuday itini ci Ye-daw a misumad tu na ayaway, ci Lan-zan micukaymas tu sakay dadinguan tu nanum, ci Se-ten patesulan tu idang nu gim a pana' nu nipiedapan a milepacaw, ci Yi-hu malingatu aca asiicelang, malawpes ci Yu-ha-pa-ha, kaisa tu wayway ni Yu-ha-pa-ha. nikalepacawan tu cacay a bataan, ci Yi-hu aci Ce-ci maleacawa, idaw ku cacyay nida a tatamaan a wawa ci Yi-yun, ci Lu-ci-ya tapabaw malasakakaay, atu ci Len-ce idaw ku wawa nuheni tu tataynaan ci Mei-hu, duma a cabayan atu mapatayay a di'tuan idaw namin ku kawaw nu heni. ci Yi-yun idaw ku caayay katinengi a icelang, u cinida a cacay malawpes nida ku icelang ni Yu-ha-pa-ha nu. "nu pinaay a malebutan nu nikalepacawan a cudad. mahedek tu". . milauyd tu tusa a mihcaan, cacayay a luma'an milabu tu sabaw tulu a kaputan nu sakakaay ci Hu-ce sabaw sepat a nipitademan, maadih nida ku aydaay atu dikuku tu sakalecad a mamalawpes nu ayda, ci Yi-un patahekalen nida ku sakatayda i dikuku a icelang, maadih nida ku dikuku nu adipapang, ina ka kunkuan caay henay ka hedek. ŚŹąťĀéšļÜ2ŚĻī, .
S.PHON: == mapatajaj di Ē~ °tu **br~…ĺ…ôa ¶ńß == aŇčaŇčan patu ¶…ôkan **** itini i "br~…ĺ…ôa ¶ńß" a kitakidan, mi ¶apitu jadańßaj nu ¶anan ¶anan nu tati…ôdan, idaw ku " ajdaaj" atu " nu mapatajaj" nu tusaaj a maudipaj mapatajaj nu nikak…ôniańßan a kitakidan. ajdaaj a nikapataj a mar~…ĺaadiŇču, paŇčaŇča ńßan "mir~…ĺimuu Ē~ °t". anu " mir~…ĺimuut" anu maar~…ĺa nu Ňčr~…ĺaj ńßamaw sa makan, sadikudaj mar~…ĺaadada nu maudipaj u " masijan", adiŇčuaj a " mapatajaj nu di Ē~ °tu" tańß…ôkar~…ĺ satu, u " sapipataj tu adiŇču a takini" r~…ĺisap…ôn…ôn ku "sijan" patajda i " mapatajaj a adiŇčuan", ju maudipan ńß…ônaj nu mi ¶id…ôkaj ku katar~…ĺ patajda ńßan namin i " i duu Ē~ °taj". it…ôban nu mapatajaj a adiŇčuan, idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj nu sapiputaw a kitidaan u sapipuńßpuńß tu adiŇčuan, u siidaaj atu mapatajaj nu di Ē~ °tuan a kitidaan kujda. *"br~…ĺ…ôa ¶ńß" . ńßu ¶u nu adiŇču itida namin mir~…ĺakar~…ĺak i patijamaj, sii ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a adiŇčuan tan…ôŇč papinanam…ôn mar~…ĺa mapatajaj a di Ē~ °tu. " ńßu-tin sabaw tur~…ĺu a kaputan" u mapatajaj a di Ē~ °tu ku par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺaj, u situŇčusaj u masakaputaj nu ¶in-r~…ĺin-t…ôn, nina masakaputaj mipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu sakapańßaj a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺa sakakaaj. ina misur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw manamuńß tu nu mipajpajaj a kawawan, pasu tun-s…ôn kaŇčar~…ĺajan nida a sakasiwa nu kur~…ĺitan *. " mapatajaj a di Ē~ °tu" mi ¶ukajmas ku mipajpajaj tu sakasiwa a kur~…ĺitan nu sapatu ¶…ôk, satu nu nisur~…ĺitaj miar~…ĺa tu namaka ¶uwa ¶uwaaj nu kanatar~…ĺan a sinzaan a ¶uda ¶udadan, ina ni paŇčaŇčanan pur~…ĺuŇč…ôn tu namaka ¶uwa ¶uwaaj a kanatar~…ĺan nu ŇčaŇčanan, "s…ô-z…ôn" atu " puo-m…ôn" patu ¶…ôk ńßan namaka ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan- ¶iw, "buna ¶ s…ôp sur~…ĺit mika ¶awaj masakaputaj" nipatu ¶…ôkan namakajda i d…ô-kuo a kanatar~…ĺan, pur~…ĺuŇč…ôn tu " kir~…ĺis…ôtu" atu " ju-taj-kiwkaj" a ¶udadan. , . kakuŇčkuan **** nikak…ônisan tu kakuŇčkuan ****** ¶i ńß…ô- ¶i-ji-ńßu makam…ôr~…ĺaw tu nikapatajan nu mi ¶udadaj tu nu siniŇčan, idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj a d…ômiadan ¶i mapatajaj nu kir~…ĺaŇčan ¶i r~…ĺu- ¶i-ja mir~…ĺadaj tu duu Ē~ °taj a adipapaŇč tańß…ôkar~…ĺ tajda i kakabian nida, sajawaj pabar~…ĺiw ¶i nida, nika kir~…ĺur~…ĺsa idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj nu masijanaj a tad…ômaw mi Ē~ °dis tu ¶i ji-ńßu a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an. ¶i r~…ĺu- ¶i-ja atu masijanaj tu nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan a maduka, ńßaŇč satu pab…ôr~…ĺi ku mapatajaj a di Ē~ °tu tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ¶i ji-ńßuan, pab…ôr~…ĺi…ôn ku mapatajaj nu di Ē~ °tuan sapir~…ĺawp…ôs ¶i masijanaj, mapaaw ¶i nida tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ni ji-ńßu. ¶i ji-ńßu ńßamin ńßan mir~…ĺawp…ôs tu ¶i sijanan, katukuńß tu ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiadan ¶i r~…ĺu- ¶i-ja pab…ôr~…ĺi…ôn nida ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč i mapatajaj di Ē~ °tuan maadińß nu mapatajaj nu adiŇčuan, u ńßu-tin sabaw tur~…ĺu a kaputan …ôn…ôm masakaputaj nu tusa a sakakaaj ¶i siw-mu-paj- ¶aj a ¶i a-san- ¶in-r~…ĺ…ôn- ¶…ô pa ¶i ¶i Ē~ ° ńßan nida patajda tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i mapatajaj nu adiŇčuan. ¶i r~…ĺu- ¶i-ja pataj ńßan tu, tu maŇčar~…ĺaj a miar~…ĺa ¶i r~…ĺu- ¶i-jaan, ¶i ji-ńßu miar~…ĺa tu nipi ¶id…ôkan tu nipikunr~…ĺiŇčan ¶i pu-j…ô-si- ¶u Ē~ ° tu ¶…ôn-ńßun-daw " mir~…ĺaŇčatu mip…ô ¶a Ē~ °", mapur~…ĺuŇč atu kaput ¶i ¶in-san- ¶…ô- ¶i a ¶i ¶a-tu-taj-ńßu, m…ôi- ¶i-s…ô-s…ô-t…ôn-ji-r~…ĺuŇč, pu-j…ôn a mat…ôn…ôsaj nu ¶abajan ¶i s…ô-fun-j…ôn-j…ô-j mar~…ĺadaj ku nu ńß…ôni a ¶i pu-j…ôn nu gigi ¶uan tar~…ĺaajaw tajda i mapatajaj nu adiŇčuan. taw, mar~…ĺawr~…ĺaw namin kina ¶in-r~…ĺi-tin. ja katuudaj mid…ôbuŇč namini i " r~…ĺiw-ńßuo", r~…ĺawa…ôn nu mapatajaj di Ē~ °tu. ¶i ji-ńßu itida i papur~…ĺur~…ĺan nu r~…ĺu- ¶i-ja a mapur~…ĺur~…ĺ " ¶…ôn- ¶uj-kuŇč" tu nuajawan mar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß a ¶i siw-mu-paj- ¶aj, maŇčar~…ĺaj mi Ē~ °dis ¶i paj- ¶ajan, sar~…ĺabi sa ¶i ji-ńßu a ¶i ji- ¶in mi ¶udad tu ¶in-ńßun-daw *, misabar~…ĺuńßaj tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč a miput tu sapipataj. si ¶umiaj nu namipa ¶ukaj ¶i r~…ĺan-zan nu ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu masakaputaj ¶i z…ô-ńßun-tun-s…ô-r~…ĺaŇč saan tut ur~…ĺu a masakaputaj a sakakaaj ¶i s…ô Ē~ °-wan-in u mipa ¶ukaj a tad…ômaw sa, sadikudaj katin…ôŇčan nu taw ar~…ĺaw u miu ¶ur~…ĺaj tu katuudaj kina mapatajaj ¶i r~…ĺan-zan . ina ¶i r~…ĺan-zan itini i papatajaj patańß…ôkar~…ĺ…ôn nida ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, maar~…ĺa nida ku ir~…ĺabuaj nu udipan ni r~…ĺu- ¶i-aj a "puŇč-ji", mar~…ĺadaj satu tatusaj tadikud i " sijan kitidaan". mańß…ôd…ôk tu. nadikudan nu nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan ńßamaw satu a masaŇča, ¶i ji-ńßu tar~…ĺuma tu nu ajdaaj a nikaudip mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu midajr~…ĺi tu mapatajaj di Ē~ °tu a kawaw. duma satu, wama ni ji-ńßu matapar~…ĺ nida ku wajwaj ni r~…ĺan-zan, tu nikar~…ĺiŇčatu a mar~…ĺamapatajaj di Ē~ °tu a nika tańß…ôkar~…ĺ. ¶i ji-ńßu namaka sijan mabir~…ĺir~…ĺ a tajni, ¶aaj pakad…ôm…ô ¶ ¶i r~…ĺan-zanan. ¶i r~…ĺan-zan a ¶i puŇč-ji mapur~…ĺuŇč mikikaka tu mapatajaj di Ē~ °tu a ¶i sijan nu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, adidi Ē~ ° tu ku Ňčar~…ĺaj ¶i ji-ńßuan. ¶i ji-sin putun…ôn nida tu d…ômiad mi…ôdap ¶i ji-ńßuan a mi ¶udad, mańß…ôd…ôk tu mi ¶udad ¶i ji-ńßu u pataj di Ē~ °tu a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku sapipar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ " sadikudaj nu j…ô-ja-t…ôn- ¶un", mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i mid…ôm…ô ¶ ¶i r~…ĺan-zan, dak…ôp…ôn ¶i r~…ĺan-zan pur~…ĺur~…ĺ ńßan tu. . mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ satu ku mapatajaj di Ē~ °tu a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, ¶i ji-ńßu midajr~…ĺi tu sakatar~…ĺuma i mapatajaj di Ē~ °tuan, matur~…ĺin a itida i kun- ¶uo-tin a mikur~…ĺi. itida i " ¶aajaj pakaadińß tu kanatar~…ĺan" a m…ôn- ¶…ôi-s…ô masakaputaj mid…ôbuŇč tu sijan a nijaduan, ar~…ĺa ńßan nida ¶i puo-min mar~…ĺańßitaj nida, d…ôbuŇčan ku ¶in-r~…ĺin-t…ôn jadańß ku nipipataj tu mapatajaj di Ē~ °tuan, tajda satu i sakakaaj ¶i san-p…ôn-j…ôn-r~…ĺiw- ¶aj a kanatar~…ĺan saan a musakamu. ina " ¶aajaj pakaadińß tu kanatar~…ĺan" ina sakakaaj ¶i ju-ńßa-pa-ńßa u tapaŇč nu mi…ô- ¶i…ô a mipatajaj, mipatajaj tu r~…ĺin-wan, patid…ôŇč tu naji ku pataj ńßan nanaj, naji ku tar~…ĺaw ni kitakid a mukti. . ¶aajaj kam…ôr~…ĺaw nu ti-kuo a nipar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu nipidi Ē~ °san, utiińß a mipu Ē~ °t ku mapatajaj a di Ē~ °tu, ¶i ju-ńßa-pa-ńßa mid…ôbuŇč tu r~…ĺin-wan-kun, mi ¶ar~…ĺiw tu r~…ĺima ni ji-ńßu a mipataj tu r~…ĺin-wan. ¶i ju-ńßa-pa-ńßa ar~…ĺaw…ôn nida ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ni r~…ĺin-wan, mar~…ĺa sasumad…ôn tu tatajda nu sasakakatin…ôŇčan. ¶i ju-ńßa-pa-ńßa itini i kapatajan nu aadiŇčuan patid…ôŇč tu biju, ¶i ji-ńßu katuud ku nu ńß…ôni a mid…ôbuŇč tija bijuan, ¶i s…ô-t…ôn-ji-r~…ĺun miar~…ĺ…ôs a mid…ôbuŇč pasajda i tawan a mi…ôdap, nika ¶i ji-ńßu mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw ńß…ônaj ar~…ĺaw…ôn ni ju-ńßa-pa-ńßa ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč. sadikudaj itini ¶i j…ô-daw a misumad tu na ajawaj, ¶i r~…ĺan-zan mi ¶ukajmas tu sakaj dadiŇčuan tu nanum, ¶i s…ô-t…ôn pat…ôsur~…ĺan tu idaŇč nu gim a pana Ē~ ° nu nipi…ôdapan a mir~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw, ¶i ji-ńßu mar~…ĺiŇčatu a ¶a asii ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, mar~…ĺawp…ôs ¶i ju-ńßa-pa-ńßa, kaisa tu wajwaj ni ju-ńßa-pa-ńßa. nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan, ¶i ji-ńßu a ¶i ¶…ô- ¶i mar~…ĺ…ôa ¶awa, idaw ku ¶a ¶jaj nida a tatamaan a wawa ¶i ji-jun, ¶i r~…ĺu- ¶i-ja tapabaw mar~…ĺasakakaaj, atu ¶i r~…ĺ…ôn- ¶…ô idaw ku wawa nuńß…ôni tu tatajnaan ¶i m…ôi-ńßu, duma a ¶abajan atu mapatajaj a di Ē~ °tuan idaw namin ku kawaw nu ńß…ôni. ¶i ji-jun idaw ku ¶aajaj katin…ôŇči a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, u ¶inida a ¶a ¶aj mar~…ĺawp…ôs nida ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ni ju-ńßa-pa-ńßa nu. "nu pinaaj a mar~…ĺ…ôbutan nu nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan a ¶udad. mańß…ôd…ôk tu". . mir~…ĺaujd tu tusa a mińß ¶aan, ¶a ¶ajaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an mir~…ĺabu tu sabaw tur~…ĺu a kaputan nu sakakaaj ¶i ńßu- ¶…ô sabaw s…ôpat a nipitad…ôman, maadińß nida ku ajdaaj atu dikuku tu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a mamar~…ĺawp…ôs nu ajda, ¶i ji-un patańß…ôkar~…ĺ…ôn nida ku sakatajda i dikuku a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, maadińß nida ku dikuku nu adipapaŇč, ina ka kunkuan ¶aaj ńß…ônaj ka ńß…ôd…ôk. *****, .
